name: Create Sensor Data Table
topic: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sensor_data (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   timestamp DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   temp REAL,   hum REAL,   soil INTEGER );

name: Crop Info Card A
format:
{{msg.payload.data.common_name || '—'}} ({{msg.payload.data.scientific_name || '—'}})

Family: {{msg.payload.data.family.common_name || msg.payload.data.family || '—'}}

Sowing: {{msg.payload.data.sowing || 'Unknown'}}

pH Range: {{ (msg.payload.data.growth && msg.payload.data.growth.ph_minimum) ? msg.payload.data.growth.ph_minimum : 5.5 }} – {{ (msg.payload.data.growth && msg.payload.data.growth.ph_maximum) ? msg.payload.data.growth.ph_maximum : 7.0 }}

Ideal Temperature: {{ (msg.payload.data.growth && msg.payload.data.growth.minimum_temperature && msg.payload.data.growth.minimum_temperature.celsius) ? msg.payload.data.growth.minimum_temperature.celsius : 15 }} °C – {{ (msg.payload.data.growth && msg.payload.data.growth.maximum_temperature && msg.payload.data.growth.maximum_temperature.celsius) ? msg.payload.data.growth.maximum_temperature.celsius : 30 }} °C

Days to Harvest: {{ msg.payload.data.days_to_harvest || 60 }}

name: Extract Weather Info
Weather A
format:
📅 {{msg.payload.forecast_time}}
📍 Location: {{msg.payload.city}}, {{msg.payload.country}}
🌀 Condition: 🌧️ ☁️ ☀️ ❄️ {{msg.payload.weather}} ({{msg.payload.description}})
🌡 Temperature (outside): {{msg.payload.temp}} °C (Feels like {{msg.payload.feels_like}} °C)
💧 Humidity: {{msg.payload.humidity}}%
💨 Wind: {{msg.payload.wind}} m/s
🌧 Expected Rain in 3h: {{msg.payload.rain}} mm
